description_long: This is a standard 12-ounce aluminum can with a bright red exterior, commonly used for soft drinks. The can features bold, colorful graphics with the words 'Diet Soda' and '0 Calories' prominently displayed on the front, along with a blue and white burst design. Nutritional information and a list of ingredients are printed on the back in black and white, while additional text such as 'Please Recycle' and 'Contains vitamins B6 and B12' appears near the base. The top of the can is metallic silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The overall surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. The can is cylindrical, lightweight, and designed to be easily held in one hand.
description: A bright red aluminum soda can with bold 'Diet Soda' graphics, nutritional labeling, and a metallic pull-tab top. The surface is smooth, glossy, and cylindrical.
description_view_0: This view shows the back of the can, highlighting the nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, and 'Please Recycle' message.
description_view_1: This angled view reveals part of the 'Diet Soda' logo and some of the ingredient text, with the burst graphic partially visible.
description_view_2: The front of the can is visible, displaying the large 'Diet Soda' logo, '0 Calories', '100% unsweetened', and 'NEW Formula' graphics.
description_view_3: This side view shows the '0 CALORIES PER SERVING' text vertically, along with part of the nutrition facts panel and the can's curved profile.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, a nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the can.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The front of the can features '100% unsweetened' and 'NEW Formula' promotional graphics in blue and white bursts.
